component.name: UMML
component.summary: Umamusume mod loader with Linux and Steam Proton support

description.p: UMML can inspect mod packages, create backups, load replacement assets, preview supported assets, and restore original Umamusume Pretty Derby game files.
This build adds native Linux and Steam Proton discovery while preserving the upstream Windows and regional installation paths.
Fixes symlinked Steam game selection with separate Proton data.
Fixes Linux Mint Steam discovery and adds manual game selection.
Adds self-contained DEB and AppImage packages.
